commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a Control UI document-title helper, wires lifecycle updates to active session/session metadata changes, and adds node tests for title resolution and `document.title` sync.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +91. Total +135 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main has a static Control UI HTML title and no existing UI `document.title` writer for session-specific names. I did not run a live browser repro in this read-only review.
